news.t: Pacer ETFs Factor Series Crosses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management

holdings.infoBox: PAMC is an equity ETF with a total of 150 individual holdings. The top holdings are TD SYNNEX stock at 2.51%, Curtiss-Wright at 2.11%, Flex Ltd. at 2.09%, Alcoa at 1.85%, and Sterling Infrastructure at 1.82%.

overview.description: The Pacer Lunt MidCap Multi-Factor Alternator ETF (PAMC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund invests in US mid-cap equities that allocates to multi-factor sub-indices based on relative strength. PAMC was launched on Jun 24, 2020 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Lunt Capital U.S. MidCap Multi-Factor Rotation Index

data.title: Pacer ETFs Factor Series Crosses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs (“Pacer”), an ETF provider that offers strategy-driven, rules-based ETFs, announces the Pacer Factor ETF Series (“Factor series”) has surpassed $1 billion in ...
